name: Hatsuho Shouji Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hatsuho Shouji Co.,Ltd. operates as a general trading company in Japan. It sells construction hardware and steel base materials, and non-combustible materials; and architectural interior and exterior materials. The company is also involved in the sheet metal processing and sheet metal work business; roofing and interior finishing business; fly, earthwork, and exterior work business; steel structure construction and rebar construction business; straight line processing, bending processing, screw processing and sale of wire; installation and sale of solar power generation panels, and lighting equipment; and sale of architectural stud guns. Hatsuho Shouji Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
